regionalBreakdown.region: Borkou, Ennedi Ouest, Ennedi Est and Tibesti provinces

ie.updateNote: There remains a risk of public protests throughout Chad, which may occur in N’Djamena and other cities. Security forces often use live ammunition to disperse protests, leading to civilian fatalities and casualties. Citizens should exercise extra vigilance and caution, avoiding any demonstrations or large gatherings of people.

au.updateNote: Still current at:09 July 2026 Updated:10 November 2025 Latest update:We continue to advise do not travel to Chad due to the dangerous security situation and the threat of terrorism, kidnapping and violent crime. Other levels apply in some areas. Airports and borders may close suddenly. If you decide to remain, you're responsible for your own safety. Our ability to provide consular services in Chad
